title: Our Leadership and Advisory Team
text:

Leadership and Advisory

# Our Leadership and Advisory Team

Our executive leadership team is a passionate bunch of industry veterans who are driven by the vision of a skills-first planet.

Metallic robotic hand holding a cluster of glowing geometric cubes with abstract icons and data visuals surrounding it..webp)

Robotic hand holding a floating cluster of purple and blue translucent cubes encircled by icons representing charts, users, notes, and ideas..webp)

iMocha started to brew over a cup of coffee between our founders, while discussing the skills challenges faced by the modern companies. Cut to present day, we’re 250+ people strong, sprinting towards our skills-first vision with our Skills Intelligence platform.
